class.name: AudioStreamPlaybackPlaylist
class.description: Playback component of [AudioStreamPlaylist]. Handles the playback of multiple [AudioStream]s in sequence.

method.name: change_stream
method.description: Changes to a specific stream within the playlist (by index). Sends an error to the console if [param stream_index] is out of bounds.

method.name: get_current_stream_index
method.description: Get the currently playing audio stream index.

method.name: get_stream_playback_position
method.description: Return the playback position of the currently-playing stream. This is different from the [code]get_playback_position()[/code] which returns the playback position of the entire playlist.

method.name: next_stream
method.description: Play the next stream. The next random stream is played if [member AudioStreamPlaylist.shuffle] is enabled. If [member AudioStreamPlaylist.loop] is disabled and is the last already, nothing will happen.

method.name: previous_stream
method.description: Play the previous stream. The previous random stream is played if [member AudioStreamPlaylist.shuffle] is enabled. If [member AudioStreamPlaylist.loop] is disabled and is the first already, nothing will happen.

signal.name: stream_changed
signal.description: Emitted when the playlist player changes which stream is playing.

signal.name: stream_looped
signal.description: Emitted when the currently-playing stream loops and begins playback again.
